title: Resolve Hardens Under Kaido’s Cruel War
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, X Drake, Unknown person #10, Chopper, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
scene: The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He just flipped sides as soon as he got caught!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's best to crush their 2nd and 3rd best fighters early on...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But who would have thought that JUDGE'S SOW is part of this crew...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aaaahh! I thought I was going to become a demon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a relief!! Since you don't have either skin, blood vessels or body heat...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You're the same as a dead body!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm a little offended by that fact!! Regardless, I'm INVINGIBLE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The virus rapidly spreads because the body freezes...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmm... is that even possible from within the body?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Chopper!! What happened to your arm!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I did it!! I got her!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yeah!! MeIt away just like that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't really need my help, do you?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Resolve Under Kaido’s Rule storyline with 37 dialogue beats. The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
